_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Better Than Wolves CE
author: phantomic12
description:
Better Than Wolves Community Edition server. Based on Minecraft 1.5.2 with the Cursed Fabric loader. Automatically installs the BTW mod and optional CraftGuide addon.
Wiki: https://wiki.btwce.com/view/Installation

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Better Than Wolves CE - Pterodactyl Egg Installation Script
# Server Files: /mnt/server

apt-get update
apt-get install -y curl jq unzip wget dos2unix
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

# Step 1: Download and run the Cursed Fabric Installer
if [ ! -f installer.jar ]; then
  echo "Downloading Cursed Fabric Installer..."
  curl -sSL -o installer.jar \
    "https://github.com/BTW-Community/legacy-fabric-installer/releases/download/1.1.1-btw/cursed-fabric-btw-installer-1.1.6.jar"
fi

echo "Running Cursed Fabric Installer (server mode)..."
java -jar installer.jar server -dir . -downloadMinecraft

if [ ! -f fabric-server-launch.jar ]; then
  echo "ERROR: fabric-server-launch.jar was not created."
  echo "Trying to find any jar that could be the server launcher..."
  ls -la *.jar || true
  SERVER_JAR=$(find . -maxdepth 1 -name '*.jar' -not -name 'installer.jar' | head -1)
  if [ -n "$SERVER_JAR" ]; then
    cp "$SERVER_JAR" fabric-server-launch.jar
    echo "Copied $SERVER_JAR to fabric-server-launch.jar"
  fi
fi

# Step 2: Create mods folder and download BTW mod
mkdir -p mods

if ! ls mods/btw-fabric-*.jar 1> /dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Downloading Better Than Wolves CE mod..."
  BTW_URL=$(curl -sSL "https://api.github.com/repos/BTW-Community/Cursed-BTW/releases" | jq -r '.[0].assets[] | select(.name | test("debug") | not) | select(.name | endswith(".jar")) | .browser_download_url' | head -1)
  if [ -n "$BTW_URL" ] && [ "$BTW_URL" != "null" ]; then
    curl -sSL -o mods/btw-mod.jar "$BTW_URL"
    echo "Downloaded BTW mod: $BTW_URL"
  else
    echo "WARNING: Could not determine BTW mod download URL"
  fi
fi

# Step 3: Optionally install CraftGuide addon
if [ "${INSTALL_CRAFT_GUIDE}" = "1" ]; then
  if ! ls mods/craft-guide-*.jar 1> /dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "Downloading CraftGuide addon..."
    CG_URL=$(curl -sSL "https://api.github.com/repos/BTW-Community/CraftGuide/releases/latest" | jq -r '.assets[0].browser_download_url')
    if [ -n "$CG_URL" ] && [ "$CG_URL" != "null" ]; then
      curl -sSL -o mods/craft-guide.jar "$CG_URL"
      echo "Downloaded CraftGuide: $CG_URL"
    else
      echo "WARNING: Could not download CraftGuide"
    fi
  fi
fi

# Step 4: Accept EULA
echo "eula=true" > eula.txt

# Step 5: Create default server.properties if missing
if [ ! -f server.properties ]; then
  cat > server.properties <<'SPROPS'
#Minecraft server properties
level-name=world
server-port=25565
level-seed=
gamemode=survival
max-players=20
motd=BTW CE Server
spawn-protection=16
online-mode=true
white-list=false
level-type=default
difficulty=2
allow-nether=true
spawn-monsters=true
spawn-animals=true
view-distance=10
tick-time=60000
SPROPS
  dos2unix server.properties 2>/dev/null || true
fi

# Step 6: Clean up installer
rm -f installer.jar

echo ""
echo "====================================="
echo "  Better Than Wolves CE installed!"
echo "====================================="
echo "Server jar: fabric-server-launch.jar"
echo "Mods folder contents:"
ls -la mods/ 2>/dev/null || echo "  (empty)"
echo ""

variables.name: Minimum Heap Memory (MB)
variables.description: The minimum amount of RAM in megabytes allocated to the Java Virtual Machine.

variables.name: Maximum Heap Memory (MB)
variables.description: The maximum amount of RAM in megabytes allocated to the Java Virtual Machine.

variables.name: MOTD
variables.description: The message shown in the server list.
variables.default_value: A Better Than Wolves CE Server

variables.name: Online Mode
variables.description: Verify players against Mojang accounts. Set to false to allow cracked/offline clients.

variables.name: Install CraftGuide
variables.description: Automatically install the CraftGuide addon on first install. Highly recommended - shows all recipes in-game (press G).
